name: HomeHub
description: A modern hub for family organization
compose:
name: slashnode-homehub
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/surajverma/homehub:0.2.3.4
    container_name: homehub
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      FLASK_ENV: production
      SECRET_KEY: ${secret.APP_SEED}
    volumes:
      - web_data-uploads:/app/uploads
      - web_data-media:/app/media
      - web_data-pdfs:/app/pdfs
      - web_data-app_data:/app/data
      - web_data-config-config.yml:/app/config.yml:ro
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:5059:5000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-uploads:
    name: slashnode-homehub_web_data-uploads
  web_data-media:
    name: slashnode-homehub_web_data-media
  web_data-pdfs:
    name: slashnode-homehub_web_data-pdfs
  web_data-app_data:
    name: slashnode-homehub_web_data-app_data
  web_data-config-config.yml:
    name: slashnode-homehub_web_data-config-config.yml
